specific_question: In Q3 2025, how many data points per EV battery module did Elexion Automotive’s lifecycle system collect through its digital twin integration?
answer: An internal analytics summary for Q3 2025 (July 1 to September 30) shows that Elexion’s digital twin system collected an average of 1,200 performance data points per battery module, covering voltage, temperature, and charge-discharge rates.
dr_question: By Q2 2026, how can Elexion Automotive leverage the integration of digital engineering methodologies with digital twins to optimize EV battery performance and lifecycle management, while ensuring regulatory compliance across North American markets?
